steph-custom-recipes.name: Crockpot Herb Butter Chicken & Wild Rice
steph-custom-recipes.desc: Half Baked Harvest · Serves 6 · 643 cal/serving · 6hr crockpot
steph-custom-recipes.body:
Ingredients

  • 2 lbs chicken thighs or breasts
  • 1 cup wild rice
  • 1 onion, diced
  • 2 carrots, sliced
  • 2 cups mushrooms, sliced
  • 2 stalks celery, sliced
  • 1 tbsp dried parsley
  • 2 tbsp olive oil (divided)
  • 3 cups chicken broth
  • 1 tsp dried thyme
  • 1 tsp dried rosemary
  • 1 tsp paprika
  • Pinch cayenne
  • 1 head garlic cloves, smashed
  • 4 tbsp butter
  • Fresh sage leaves
  • Salt & pepper
  • Parmesan rind (optional)

Instructions

  1. In crockpot, combine wild rice, onion, carrots, mushrooms, celery, dried parsley. Season with salt & pepper. Add 1 tbsp olive oil, toss. Pour over chicken broth.
  2. Toss chicken with 1 tbsp olive oil, thyme, rosemary, paprika, cayenne, salt & pepper. Place in crockpot. Add garlic and parmesan rind if using.
  3. Cover and cook on LOW 5–6 hours or HIGH 2–3 hours.
  4. Before serving, preheat broiler. Remove chicken and garlic, place on baking sheet. Arrange butter and sage around chicken. Broil 1–3 min until crisp.
  5. Peel garlic, chop and mix into butter on pan. Toss chicken in butter.
  6. Fluff rice, serve chicken over rice and veggies. Drizzle remaining butter over top.

Nutrition (per serving)

643 cal · 45g protein · 45g carbs · 28g fat · 4g fibre · 4g sugar

meals.name: Greek Yogurt Power Bowl
meals.desc: Liberté 11% Greek yogurt (¾ cup) + raspberries (½ cup) + Carbonaut granola (⅓ cup) + 2 tbsp hemp hearts + drizzle of honey. Quick, no-cook, protein-packed start.
meals.macros: ~430 cal · 32g protein · 34g carbs · 14g fat · 6g fibre · 12g sugar

meals.name: Turkey & Avocado Wrap
meals.desc: 100g deli turkey + ½ avocado + baby spinach + shredded mozzarella + Dijon in a whole wheat tortilla. Quick 5-min lunch.
meals.macros: ~420 cal · 32g protein · 28g carbs · 18g fat · 7g fibre · 3g sugar

meals.name: Apple + Almond Butter
meals.desc: 1 medium apple sliced + 1.5 tbsp almond butter. Classic afternoon snack — sweet, crunchy, satisfying.
meals.macros: ~220 cal · 4g protein · 28g carbs · 9g fat · 5g fibre · 18g sugar

meals.name: HBH 20-Min Korean Gochujang Beef Bowls
meals.desc: Quick-cooked ground beef tossed in a sweet-spicy Korean gochujang sauce with caramelized shallots and bell peppers. Served over jasmine rice with a pickled cucumber salad. Big flavour, 20 minutes flat.
meals.macros: ~620 cal · 42g protein · 52g carbs · 24g fat · 6g fibre · 8g sugar

meals.desc: ½ cup rolled oats cooked in 1 cup whole milk + 1 scoop vanilla protein powder stirred in off-heat + ½ cup blueberries + 1 tbsp almond butter + cinnamon. Warm and cozy.

meals.name: HBH Chicken Caesar Kale Salad
meals.desc: Massaged kale + romaine + 1 cup shredded rotisserie chicken + shaved parmesan + croutons + creamy Caesar dressing. Big, filling, serious flavour.
meals.macros: ~420 cal · 38g protein · 20g carbs · 18g fat · 5g fibre · 3g sugar

meals.name: Greek Yogurt + Hemp Hearts + Berries
meals.desc: ½ cup Liberté 11% Greek yogurt + 1 tbsp hemp hearts + ¼ cup mixed berries. Simple, satisfying, high protein.
meals.macros: ~200 cal · 17g protein · 12g carbs · 9g fat · 2g fibre · 8g sugar

meals.name: HBH Thai Turkey Meatballs in Coconut Curry
meals.desc: Juicy ground turkey meatballs simmered in a creamy coconut curry sauce with red curry paste, bell peppers, and scallions. Served over jasmine rice, topped with spicy coconut-basil avocado. Deeply flavourful and totally family-friendly.

meals.name: Protein Smoothie Bowl
meals.desc: 1 scoop vanilla protein powder blended with 1 cup unsweetened almond milk + ½ frozen banana + ½ cup frozen mango. Poured thick into a bowl and topped with Carbonaut granola, sliced banana, and 1 tbsp hemp hearts. Weekend-feel without the effort.
meals.macros: ~420 cal · 32g protein · 50g carbs · 10g fat · 6g fibre · 24g sugar

meals.name: Hummus & Veggie Grain Bowl
meals.desc: ½ cup cooked quinoa + roasted sweet potato cubes + sliced cucumber + cherry tomatoes + ¼ cup hummus + feta crumble + lemon-olive oil drizzle. Prep-friendly and filling.
meals.macros: ~450 cal · 16g protein · 54g carbs · 18g fat · 10g fibre · 8g sugar

meals.name: String Cheese + Almonds
meals.desc: 1 string cheese + small handful (20g) almonds. Protein + healthy fat combo — no prep needed.
meals.macros: ~200 cal · 12g protein · 4g carbs · 15g fat · 2g fibre · 1g sugar

meals.name: HBH Crispy Carnitas Tacos with Jalapeño Lime Avocado
meals.desc: Slow-cooked pork shoulder braised with chipotle, orange juice, and enchilada sauce until fall-apart tender. Stuffed into hard taco shells with cheese and baked crispy. Served with roasted jalapeño lime avocado mash. Friday dinner energy — Rush will love these.
meals.macros: ~640 cal · 44g protein · 42g carbs · 30g fat · 8g fibre · 6g sugar

steph-thrive-notes:
💡 DANCER STRENGTH & PERFORMANCE PROGRAM
Source: @frankiebiondi.physio | Saved Mar 4, 2026

A 6-week small group strength program for competitive dancers, led by a registered physiotherapist (MScPT).

DETAILS:
• In-person, 8–10 dancers per group
• Thursdays starting July 2, 2026
• Location: Happiness is Dancing, Sudbury ON
• $600/dancer (tax included) + 8-week home program
• Age groups: 7 & under / 8–9 / 10–12 / 13+
• Limited spots — first come first served

WHY IT WORKS:
• Physio-led = trust + premium positioning
• Niche-specific (dancers only)
• Multi-week commitment = recurring revenue
• Age-tiered = wide audience from one program

THRIVE APPLICATION:
Could do something similar — e.g. Pilates for Dancers, Postpartum Strength, or Teen Athlete Performance. Partner with a local physio or RMT. Small group (6–10), multi-week, seasonal intensive. Great way to fill the barn outside regular class schedule.
